mapper.select:
select count(*) from item_mst d
and delete_flg = '0'
and d.item_code like concat('%', #{itemCode}, '%')
and d.item like concat('%', #{item}, '%')

select item_id , item , item_code , unit_price , quantity , unit , item_detail , sales_tax , withholding_tax from item_mst d
and delete_flg = '0'
and d.item_code like concat('%', #{itemCode}, '%')
and d.item like concat('%', #{item}, '%')
order by d.item_code
offset ${page * size} limit ${size}
mapper.update: UPDATE item_mst SET delete_flg = '1', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE item_id = #{itemId}::uuid
